payload.query: Certain institutional features are common to all democracies, but no democratic country is exactly alike. Describe how democratic countries are different using six or more essential political institutions. Explain why different democratic countries have different institutional features. Are institutional differences accidental or part of purposive design?

articles.title: Read the Supreme Court’s Decision on Trump’s Sweeping Tariffs
articles.abstract: In a major setback for President Trump’s economic agenda, the court ruled that he could not invoke an emergency power to set tariffs on imports.
